name: Ninja Sesame Tuna Steak

ingredients.item: lemon or lime juice for sauce

instructions: If frozen, thaw tuna in the fridge or sealed in cold water.
Mix soy sauce, lemon/lime, oil, and black pepper.
Coat tuna and marinate 10 minutes only.
Press sesame seeds onto both sides.
Cook 2-3 minutes, turn, then 2-3 minutes more depending on thickness and desired doneness.
For fully cooked fish, target 63°C internally. Less cooked is a personal risk tradeoff.
Mix yogurt, mustard, soy sauce, and lemon/lime for sauce.
storage: If leftovers remain, refrigerate and use within 1-2 days.
reheating: If reheating, Ninja 180-200°C for 1-2 minutes only.
substitutions: Two cans of tuna can replace the steak using the tuna egg potato salad recipe.
Potato or rice can be used as the carb.
meal_prep_notes: Do not batch-cook all tuna steaks for the whole week.
why_it_fits_weekly_plan: Adds a fresher, more interesting high-protein dinner without complex cooking.
